plugins.name: acan-skills-bundle
plugins.description: Install all acan skills at once, including Vue 3 Composition API best practices, code organization patterns, composable design, store integration, and reactivity optimization.

plugins.name: vue-composition-api-best-practices
plugins.description: Vue 3 Composition API and <script setup> best practices. Covers SFC code organization (11-step order), useXxx function patterns, feature extraction to composables, cross-feature dependency management, TypeScript integration with props/emits/defineModel, Pinia store access inside and outside components (Store Without pattern), composable design patterns (5 patterns + testing), and reactivity & performance optimization. MUST be used when developing, refactoring, or reviewing Vue 3 applications.
